recommendations.title: The Occupant
recommendations.overview: An unemployed executive is forced to sell his apartment. When he discovers that he still has the keys, he becomes obsessed with the family that now lives there and decides to recover the life he has lost, at any price.

recommendations.title: The Last Days

recommendations.genres: Action, Drama, Horror, Science Fiction, Thriller

recommendations.title: Avengers: Age of Ultron
recommendations.overview: When Tony Stark tries to jumpstart a dormant peacekeeping program, things go awry and Earth’s Mightiest Heroes are put to the ultimate test as the fate of the planet hangs in the balance. As the villainous Ultron emerges, it is up to The Avengers to

recommendations.title: Invasion of the Body Snatchers
recommendations.overview: A small-town doctor learns that the population of his community is being replaced by emotionless alien duplicates.

recommendations.title: Outside
recommendations.overview: A family retreats to an isolated farm during a zombie outbreak, but years of painful secrets take a toll as they navigate their desolate world.

recommendations.title: Storm Boy
recommendations.overview: Storm Boy lives a lonely life with his reclusive father on a desolate coastline, but when he forms a close bond with a pelican, Mr. Percival, his life takes a new and unexpected turn.

recommendations.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay - Part 1

recommendations.title: Blade II
recommendations.overview: Blade forms an uneasy alliance with the vampire council in order to combat the Reapers, who are feeding on vampires.

recommendations.title: Transamerica
recommendations.overview: A transgender woman takes an unexpected journey when she learns that she had a son, now a teenage runaway hustling on the streets of New York.
